overview: Agriculture-focused website for Greener Advance Water Conditioner by US Technologies. Helps farmers discover and purchase water conditioning solutions that improve crop yield, reduce water hardness, and save irrigation costs. Features real farm photos, farmer testimonials, and a WhatsApp-integrated lead generation system.
features: Agriculture-themed hero with 'Increase Crop Yield' headline and WhatsApp CTA
Product showcase for Greener Advance Water Conditioner with real photos
Benefits section: higher yield, better soil, less fertilizer waste, water savings
Farmer testimonials with uploaded real photos from Karnataka installations
Photo gallery of farm installations and crops
Simple enquiry form (Name, Phone, Location) with backend storage
WhatsApp floating button for instant lead generation
Mobile-first responsive design with green and earthy color palette
SEO-optimized for agriculture water conditioner keywords
Contact section with phone +91-7972914426 and WhatsApp integration
